raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "performative admission of surrender that invokes a higher-order reality beyond egoic control",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "alcohol exerts a non-physical dominion transcending ordinary willpower",
    "personal agency has been ontologically compromised",
    "unmanageability is a spiritual condition rather than merely behavioral",
    "truthful self-assessment requires alignment with transcendent order"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "internally coherent as a paradoxical claim that agency is recovered through acknowledged loss of agency",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "a non-physical or transpersonal dimension of addiction exists such that egoic striving perpetuates bondage while surrender enables grace or alignment with that dimension",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "no such transpersonal dimension exists and the statement functions only as psychological self-suggestion that may discourage responsible action"
}
